mapper.sql: Id, title, safetype, policyid, reason, eventtime, eventaddress, detailaddress, detailaddress2, description, sunshi, userid, unitofshunshi, huming, zhanghu, kaihuhang, phone, images, zhuanyuan, zhuanyuanphone, status, createtime, updatetime, username, begintime, endtime, people, anjianid, merchantpoclicyid, personpolicyid, jigouhao
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tb_record
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_record ( title, safetype, policyid, reason, eventtime, eventaddress, detailaddress, detailaddress2, description, sunshi, userid, unitofshunshi, huming, zhanghu, kaihuhang, phone, images, zhuanyuan, zhuanyuanphone, status, createtime, updatetime, username, begintime, endtime, people, anjianid, merchantpoclicyid, personpolicyid, jigouhao) values ( #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{eventaddress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{detailaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailaddress2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sunshi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{unitofshunshi,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{huming,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhanghu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{kaihuhang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{images,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhuanyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhuanyuanphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{begintime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{endtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{people,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{anjianid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{merchantpoclicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personpolicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jigouhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into tb_record

title,

mapper.update:
update tb_record
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{record.safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
policyid = #{record.policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eventtime = #{record.eventtime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
eventaddress = #{record.eventaddress,jdbcType=INTEGER},
detailaddress = #{record.detailaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detailaddress2 = #{record.detailaddress2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sunshi = #{record.sunshi,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
unitofshunshi = #{record.unitofshunshi,jdbcType=INTEGER},
huming = #{record.huming,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhanghu = #{record.zhanghu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
kaihuhang = #{record.kaihuhang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
images = #{record.images,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhuanyuan = #{record.zhuanyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhuanyuanphone = #{record.zhuanyuanphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createtime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
updatetime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
begintime = #{record.begintime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
endtime = #{record.endtime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
people = #{record.people,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
anjianid = #{record.anjianid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
merchantpoclicyid = #{record.merchantpoclicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
personpolicyid = #{record.personpolicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jigouhao = #{record.jigouhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update tb_record set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, safetype = #{record.safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, policyid = #{record.policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reason = #{record.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eventtime = #{record.eventtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, eventaddress = #{record.eventaddress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, detailaddress = #{record.detailaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detailaddress2 = #{record.detailaddress2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{record.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sunshi = #{record.sunshi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, userid = #{record.userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, unitofshunshi = #{record.unitofshunshi,jdbcType=INTEGER}, huming = #{record.huming,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhanghu = #{record.zhanghu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, kaihuhang = #{record.kaihuhang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, images = #{record.images,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhuanyuan = #{record.zhuanyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhuanyuanphone = #{record.zhuanyuanphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createtime = #{record.createtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, updatetime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{record.username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, begintime = #{record.begintime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, endtime = #{record.endtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, people = #{record.people,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, anjianid = #{record.anjianid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, merchantpoclicyid = #{record.merchantpoclicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, personpolicyid = #{record.personpolicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jigouhao = #{record.jigouhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update tb_record
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
safetype = #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
policyid = #{policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eventtime = #{eventtime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
eventaddress = #{eventaddress,jdbcType=INTEGER},
detailaddress = #{detailaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
detailaddress2 = #{detailaddress2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sunshi = #{sunshi,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
unitofshunshi = #{unitofshunshi,jdbcType=INTEGER},
huming = #{huming,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhanghu = #{zhanghu,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
kaihuhang = #{kaihuhang,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
images = #{images,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhuanyuan = #{zhuanyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhuanyuanphone = #{zhuanyuanphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createtime = #{createtime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
updatetime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
begintime = #{begintime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
people = #{people,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
anjianid = #{anjianid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
merchantpoclicyid = #{merchantpoclicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
personpolicyid = #{personpolicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jigouhao = #{jigouhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tb_record set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, safetype = #{safetype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, policyid = #{policyid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reason = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eventtime = #{eventtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, eventaddress = #{eventaddress,jdbcType=INTEGER}, detailaddress = #{detailaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, detailaddress2 = #{detailaddress2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sunshi = #{sunshi,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, userid = #{userid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, unitofshunshi = #{unitofshunshi,jdbcType=INTEGER}, huming = #{huming,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhanghu = #{zhanghu,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, kaihuhang = #{kaihuhang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, images = #{images,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhuanyuan = #{zhuanyuan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zhuanyuanphone = #{zhuanyuanphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createtime = #{createtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, updatetime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, begintime = #{begintime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, people = #{people,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, anjianid = #{anjianid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, merchantpoclicyid = #{merchantpoclicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, personpolicyid = #{personpolicyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jigouhao = #{jigouhao,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
